# Tests currently expected to pass under tests/neo4j on jruby.
# CI fails if any of these stops passing (regression).
# Add lines as we fix more; remove with reason in commit msg.
# Sorted alphabetically. Refresh with bin/refresh-testkit-baseline neo4j (running on jruby).
# Tests known to fail in CI for env reasons live in
# .github/testkit-baseline-exclude-jruby.txt and are skipped here.

test_autocommit_transactions_should_support_metadata (tests.neo4j.test_session_run.TestSessionRun.test_autocommit_transactions_should_support_metadata)
